violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/24/2025

The cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 11/24/2025
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 11/26/2025
The rinse section of the dishwasher line was observed in poor repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/18/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils Deli Slicer, and ice machine were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice was voluntarily disposed of, establishment is not to use ice machine until it has been washed rinsed and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 11/18/2024

Bread pudding, which was prepared in advance, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours. Product was voluntarily disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/18/2024
The rinse section of the dishwasher line was observed in poor repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/18/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quat sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2024
Management's plan for assessing, monitoring, and controlling foodborne disease hazards is inadequate. New Violation. Correct By: 11/29/2023

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 12/13/2023

Food contact surfaces of the slicer was observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 11/29/2023

Cooked food items, deli-meats and cheeses were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 11/29/2023

Deli salads, deli meats and cheeses were observed marked with a date that exceeded the 7 days limit for ready to eat food items. Food items were observed from 11/2/23, 11/18/23. Food items were voluntarily disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/29/2023

(Floor Chemicals) were stored with above the 3-bay sink, food, equipment, utensils, or single service items. Chemicals must be stored to prevent the contamination of clean equipment, utensils linens, and/or single service by spacing or partitioning and locating them in an area that is not above food, equipment utensils, linens, and single service articles. Pictures taken see attachment. New Violation. Correct By: 11/29/2023

Sanitizer solution was observed to clean preparation tables at the kitchen is not approved for food contact surfaces. Chemical SANITIZERS, including chemical sanitizing solutions generated on-site, and other chemical antimicrobials applied to FOOD-CONTACT SURFACES shall: (A) Meet the requirements specified in 40 CFR 180.940 Tolerance exemptions for active and inert ingredients for use in antimicrobial formulations (Food-contact surface sanitizing solutions). New Violation. Correct By: 11/29/2023
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 12/13/2023

The non-food contacts surface of the fans above preparation tables and, behind dishwasher and juice machine; toaster; microwave and freezers have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 11/29/2023
Stagnant water was observed on floor under ice machine and juice unit. New Violation. Correct By: 12/13/2023

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored in the clean plates rack area. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/29/2023
2 door reach-in Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/14/2023

Food contact surfaces of slicer was observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/05/2023

Soup and Pasta salad, which was prepared in advance, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours. Food items were observed between 44-45 degrees F. in hermetic containers with condensation on lid. Food items were voluntarily disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/05/2023
2 door reach-in Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/19/2023

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored in the dry storage area. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. New Violation. Correct By: 07/05/2023
